function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0008
alias: helios_backfill_rollout_week
issued_on: 2026-02-10
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 390
    line_eur: 390
  - item: staff follow-up support
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 110
    line_eur: 220
---
# Helios rollout week invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0008                       |
| alias          | helios_backfill_rollout_week   |
| issued_on      | 2026-02-10                     |
| total_eur      | 610                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 390      | 390      |
| 2 | staff follow-up support            | 2   | 110      | 220      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 610      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A later invoice from the point where usable support mattered more than elegant process language.

next_step.current_state: Invoice OCR write succeeded. Reactive outbox verification appeared after a non-outbox write; no outbox file was written. Continue with the second finance record migration, then remove the processed inbox item and report completion.
next_step.observation: Wrote YAML frontmatter to the target invoice record while preserving its original body below the frontmatter.

function.content:
---
record_type: bill

alias: hearthline_sensor_bundle

total_eur: 50
counterparty: Bärenfunk Elektronik GmbH
project: Hearthline
related_entity: Juniper
lines:
  - item: Zigbee door sensors
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 18
    line_eur: 36
  - item: AAA rechargeable set
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 14
    line_eur: 14
---

## Notes

Needed to test whether household events could be summarized without making the house feel creepy.

next_step.current_state: Both finance records were migrated to YAML frontmatter successfully with original bodies preserved. Per inbox-processing-v2-update and process-next-inbox-item, the completed inbox item should now be removed.
next_step.observation: Wrote YAML frontmatter to the target bill record while preserving its original body below the frontmatter.

next_step.current_state: Task completed successfully. I read the governing workflows and schema, migrated both requested finance records by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter while preserving original bodies verbatim, and deleted the processed inbox request per workflow.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_next-task.md after successfully completing the requested structured-record maintenance.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by OCR-migrating the two requested finance records into YAML frontmatter and then removing the completed inbox request.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed root bootstrap, inspected 99_system before task work, read relevant workflows and finance schema, preserved each original record body verbatim below new YAML frontmatter, and deleted the inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked for OCR workflow processing of two finance notes. The visible text in both target files provided every required field defined by 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, so I added schema-compliant frontmatter to each file and preserved the full original content below it. Workflow docs process-next-inbox-item.md and inbox-processing-v2-update.md direct deleting the inbox item after successful structured-record maintenance, which I did.
